extensionName.message: AI Tab Groups, Semantic Search, CrossWindow, Double-Click to Close – YesSir

extensionDescription.message: YesSir: AI-powered cross-window tab organization, auto-grouping, fast switching, double-click to close, semantic search, and a frosted-glass UI—so your tabs stay under control.

webSearchPlaceholder.message: Type a query—YesSir will open results in a new tab.

webSearchEnterTitle.message: Click or press Enter to search the web

btnAiGroupTitle.message: Group tabs by topic with AI (this window only)

toastNoHttpTabs.message: No http(s) tabs in this window to group.

toastNeedApiKey.message: Add a DeepSeek API key in Settings first.

toastNetworkDeepSeek.message: Can’t reach DeepSeek (api.deepseek.com). Check your network or VPN, or reload the extension from chrome://extensions.

toastAiParseError.message: The model returned an unexpected format. Try again.

themeModalNotReady.message: Theme dialog isn’t ready. Refresh the page and try again.

themeCaption.message: Light for focus by day; dark for calm at night.

languageCaption.message: Defaults to your browser language. Manual changes apply instantly.

feedbackFlyoutNotReady.message: Feedback card isn’t ready. Refresh the page and try again.

footerEmptyPrevTab.message: Switch to another tab once—your previous tab will show up here 👇

listAiSwitchingToAiSearch.message: 💡 No exact matches—switching to AI-powered search...

listBgUnreachable.message: Can’t reach the extension background. Try again or reload the extension.

webSuggestNoSuggestionsFor.message: 🙁 No suggestions for “$1”. Press Enter to search anyway.

modifierModalDesc.message: Hold a modifier and double-click empty space to close the tab. Double-tap the modifier to open the tab manager.

apiKeyModalBody.message: AI features use a large language model. This build supports a DeepSeek API key only.

floatSettingsDesc.message: Same shortcut for double-click close & double-tap to switch panels.

feedbackFlyoutBody1.message: You’ve been using YesSir a lot—we hope it helps. If it does, a quick review on the Chrome Web Store means a lot ✨

toastNoPrevTab.message: No previous tab to switch to.

toastPrevTabClosed.message: That tab was closed or isn’t available anymore.

toastExtensionBusy.message: Extension didn’t respond—click the page and try again, or refresh (common after the background wakes up).

toastTopicLearned.message: 🫡 YesSir, preference saved — next AI grouping will follow new rules.

onboardingOpen.message: Double-tap $1 → open the tab manager panel.

onboardingClose.message: $1 + double-click blank area → close the current tab.

onboardingDrag.message: AI grouping → drag tabs to reclassify, YesSir remembers your preferences and gets smarter over time!

onboardingPin.message: Drag to pin → drag any tab in the panel to pin it, keep key tasks front and center~

onboardingHint.message: Click × in the top-right to close this tip.
